violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Jerky, sausage, and muscle cuts of deer stored in upright freezer.
Food source requirements. — --Game animal was not processed under inspection. Store personal food items at home.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Spongelike shelf liner does not meet design characteristics.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed to cooking equipment/freezers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required General cleaning needed in kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate.
